creator: martti.kuparinen@ericsson.com
text:
As the JDK was upgraded to version 1.1.8, I have upgraded the
documentation and tutorial ports to version 1.1.8 as well.

How-To-Repeat: 
The following file (uuencoded, tarred and gzipped) contains the
new version of jdk-doc and jdk-tutorial. As the PLIST files were
heavily modified I did not submit a patch but the complete
port files.
